wgs_prep_pcr_enrichment_combined_dry_v1.label: Combined WGS preparation + HHS and PCR enrichment + ODTC one-column dry deck

items.instruction: Seat the P10 rack; tip-rack columns 1 and 2 (A1:H1 and A2:H2) must be intact.
items.why: The WGS preparation dry lysis and reaction motions use these two tip columns and return them.

items.instruction: Seat the P50 rack; tip-rack columns 1 and 2 (A1:H1 and A2:H2) must be intact.
items.why: The PCR enrichment1 and PCR2 dry master-mix motions use these tip-rack columns.

items.instruction: Seat the P300 rack; tip-rack column 1 (A1:H1) must be intact.
items.why: The dry cleanup rehearsal uses this rack and returns tips.

items.instruction: Seat one bare, empty sacrificial work plate squarely in the site.
items.why: This is the single plate moved through the HHS, magnet, and ODTC landing sites.

items.instruction: Seat the empty source plate; WGS preparation source columns 1 and 3 must be clear.
items.why: The dry runner models WGS preparation and PCR enrichment source geometry here. No reagent is loaded.

items.instruction: Keep the correct magnet block installed and aligned; its plate landing area must be empty (no plate or lid).
items.why: The work plate is delivered here for the PCR enrichment cleanup rehearsal.

items.instruction: Seat the empty trough; A1, A2, A3, A4, and A12 must be empty and clear.
items.why: The dry cleanup models beads, ethanol, elution, and waste at these wells.

items.instruction: Seat the park plate—the lid support, not the work/source plate—squarely with the correct lid flat, centered, and unable to rock.
items.why: The iSWAP carries this lid to the HHS and ODTC plate, then returns it here.

items.instruction: Keep the HHS installed. Confirm its landing nest is empty (contains no plate or lid), open and idle, with a clear iSWAP path.
items.why: The WGS preparation plate and lid land here. The dry sequence does not heat or shake the HHS.

items.instruction: Keep the ODTC installed. Confirm its landing nest is empty (contains no plate or lid), open, cool and idle, with a clear iSWAP path.
items.why: The PCR enrichment plate and lid land here twice. The dry sequence does not contact or heat the ODTC.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm every pipetting channel is untipped.
global_checks.why: The modeled starting state assumes clear channels.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm the iSWAP holds nothing and every transfer path is clear.
global_checks.why: A stale plate, lid, or obstruction makes the modeled deck state false.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm the carriers and installed HHS/ODTC modules are secured at the validated rail targets 48, 35, 27, and 20.
global_checks.why: The validated geometry is tied to these exact rail targets and modeled positions.

global_checks.instruction: Confirm there are no samples, reagents, ethanol, or water on the deck.
global_checks.why: This release envelope is an empty-labware dry rehearsal only.

global_checks.instruction: A trained operator remains at the deck with immediate E-stop access.
global_checks.why: No software interface replaces continuous physical observation.
